# Cosmic Harmony
## Scripture
Colossians 1:16-17 says, "For by Him all things were created, both in the heavens and on earth, visible and invisible, whether thrones or dominions or rulers or authorities—all things have been created through Him and for Him. He is before all things, and in Him all things hold together."

## Reflection
As we gaze up at the night sky, we are reminded of the incredible harmony that exists within our universe. The planets orbit in perfect sync, the stars shine with precise brightness, and the galaxies rotate with majestic beauty. This cosmic harmony is a reflection of God's character, who brings order and balance to all of creation. Just as the universe is held together by Christ, our lives can also be held together by Him. In the midst of chaos and uncertainty, we can find peace and stability in the fact that God is the one who sustains all things.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, we are in awe of the majesty and harmony of Your creation. Help us to see Your hand at work in the intricacies of the universe and in our own lives. May we find comfort and peace in the fact that You are the one who holds all things together. As we celebrate our nation's birthday today, remind us of the freedom and joy that comes from living in harmony with You. We pray in Jesus' name, Amen.
